---
title: "PULSE Annual Workshop"
author: "PULSE TCDC"
date: today
---

### Welcome!

::: {.callout-tip}
### Info
The first PULSE Annual Workshop was held **March 10-13, 2026** in Uppsala, Sweden. 
:::

## Workshop Sessions
The four transferrable skills sessions of the 2026 PULSE workshop were:

| | Session Title | 
|------|------|
| 1 | **Beyond the Bench: Impact of Science on Industry, Policy & Society** | 
| 2 | **[Ethics for Future Leaders](workshop-s2.qmd)** | 
| 3 | **[Research Culture: Bias, Inclusivity, and Equality in Science](workshop-s3.qmd)** | 
| 4 | **Entrepreneurial Mindset 101: Pitch a project** | 
: {tbl-colwidths="[5,95]"} 


The meeting also included one full day of research presentations and discussion to support interactions between group leaders, postdocs, and others.
